about.heading: About
about.content: 20+ years of experience designing, optimising and delivering enterprise-scale API systems in C# .NET, ASP.NET, LINQ & SQL. Skilled in Agile/Scrum environments, mentoring and driving reliable, high-performance software solutions.

interests.heading: Interests
interests.content: Learning new technologies. Keen interest in amateur astronomy and astrophotography. Drone flying and producing video content.
